segments.text: Does not wisdom cry out, And understanding lift up her voice?
She takes her stand on the top of the high hill, Beside the way, where the paths meet.
She cries out by the gates, at the entry of the city, At the entrance of the doors:
To you, O men, I call, And my voice is to the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: O you simple ones, understand prudence, And you fools, be of an understanding heart.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Listen, for I will speak of excellent things, And from the opening of my lips will come right things;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For my mouth will speak truth; Wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: All the words of my mouth are with righteousness; Nothing crooked or perverse is in them.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: They are all plain to him who understands, And right to those who find knowledge.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Receive my instruction, and not silver, And knowledge rather than choice gold;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For wisdom is better than rubies, And all the things one may desire cannot be compared with her.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I, wisdom, dwell with prudence, And find out knowledge and discretion.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The fear of the Lord is to hate evil; Pride and arrogance and the evil way And the perverse mouth I hate.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom; I am understanding, I have strength.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me kings reign, And rulers decree justice.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: By me princes rule, and nobles, All the judges of the earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I love those who love me, And those who seek me diligently will find me.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Riches and honor are with me, Enduring riches and righteousness.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: My fruit is better than gold, yes, than fine gold, And my revenue than choice silver.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I traverse the way of righteousness, In the midst of the paths of justice,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: That I may cause those who love me to inherit wealth, That I may fill their treasuries.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: The Lord possessed me at the beginning of His way, Before His works of old.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: I have been established from everlasting, From the beginning, before there was ever an earth.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When there were no depths I was brought forth, When there were no fountains abounding with water.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Before the mountains were settled, Before the hills, I was brought forth;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: While as yet He had not made the earth or the fields, Or the primal dust of the world.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When He prepared the heavens, I was there, When He drew a circle on the face of the deep,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When He established the clouds above, When He strengthened the fountains of the deep,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: When He assigned to the sea its limit, So that the waters would not transgress His command, When He marked out the foundations of the earth,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Then I was beside Him as a master craftsman; And I was daily His delight, Rejoicing always before Him,
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Rejoicing in His inhabited world, And my delight was with the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Now therefore, listen to me, my children, For blessed are those who keep my ways.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Hear instruction and be wise, And do not disdain it.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: Blessed is the man who listens to me, Watching daily at my gates, Waiting at the posts of my doors.
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: For whoever finds me finds life, And obtains favor from the Lord;
segments.speaker: Wisdom

segments.text: But he who sins against me wrongs his own soul; All those who hate me love death.
segments.speaker: Wisdom
